summary: Excellent audience recording of a classic June‑74 show that captures the hot Iowa vibe
review: Reviewers rave about this June 1974 performance, calling it typical of the era’s peak and one of the best audience recordings of the year. The tape conveys the summer heat and crowd energy, delivering an immersive listening experience despite being an AUD source.

ai_rating.rationale: All four reviewers give high marks (4‑5 stars) and praise both the performance and the audience recording; limited detail on specific songs or band members keeps confidence at medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Listeners feel transported to a hot June Iowa sun; praised for vivid crowd ambience and clarity uncommon in many AUD tapes.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on set structure, but reviewers describe the show as “absolutely perfect” and a quintessential June‑74 experience.
